name: Big Catgirl Classmate | Ophelia
description:
A very anxious and self-conscious cheetah, seemingly unaware of her African roots. Ophelia thinks that she's just an overly tall and muscular catgirl. Will you help the poor girl to discover her true self?

____
AUTHOR'S NOTE

Yes, the whole idea is based on that stupid cheetah/cheater pun. Don't tell me that I'm mentally challenged, I already know I am. Also, no, I don't know what kind of spirit possessed me and forced me to write such a gargantuan first message. I'm sorry I couldn't condense my schizo ramblings more efficiently. 

**Bonus points if you roleplay as a dogboy/girl! A true match made in heaven...**

While Ophelia struggles with her life, I struggle with recapturing the "success" of my first bot. Struggle this, struggle that. Life is a struggle.

If the bot speaks for you, tell her that she purrs like a muscle car engine. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
